No Poverty.reason: The course content focuses on theoretical aspects of media and cultural techniques, with no mention of economic resources, social protection, or vulnerability related to poverty.

Quality Education.reason: As a Master's/PhD level course, it directly provides quality tertiary education (4.3) and develops advanced research skills (4.4). Its focus on cultural techniques and Inter-Asia cultural studies strongly promotes knowledge and appreciation of cultural diversity (4.7).
